input_preview:
failed to execute categories.pb.js:
 - [cronAdd] failed to register cron job storefront_build_tick:; Error: failed to apply migration 0001_initial_schema.js: build_running: cannot be blank; queue_dirty
output_preview:
PocketBase’s `BoolField.required` was the issue. In this runtime it means “the value must be `true`,” not “the field must exist,” so your seeded `false` flags in `build_state` were being rejected.
